HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

9#include <blitz/array.h>
10#include <iostream>
11#include <string>
12#include <cmath>
13#include <stdio.h>
14#include "CLParser.h"
15#include "mathFunctions.h"
16
33int main(int argc, char *argv[]) {
34 bool help(false);
35 std::string fileName1("");
36 std::string fileName2("");
37 std::string fileName3("");
38 std::string fileName4("");
39
40 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
41 // Setup command line arguments
42 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
43 std::vector<CLParser *> clParser;
44 clParser.push_back(new CLStringOption("-r", &fileName1));
45 clParser.push_back(new CLStringOption("-w", &fileName2));
46 clParser.push_back(new CLStringOption("-rb", &fileName3));
47 clParser.push_back(new CLStringOption("-wb", &fileName4));
48 clParser.push_back(new CLFlag("--help", &help));
49
50 // Parse command line and overwrite defaults
51 for (std::vector<CLParser *>::iterator pIter = clParser.begin();
52 pIter != clParser.end(); pIter++) {
53 (*pIter)->Parse(argc, argv);
54 }
55
56 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
57 // Dispatch modes
58 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
59 if (help) {
60 std::cout
61 << "HELIOS SIE periodic error function table generation"
62 << std::endl;
63 std::cout << " read text table: -r [FILENAME]" << std::endl;
64 std::cout << " write text table: -w [FILENAME]" << std::endl;
65 std::cout << " read binary table: -rb [FILENAME]" << std::endl;
66 std::cout << " write binary table: -wb [FILENAME]" << std::endl;
67 } else if (fileName1 != "") {
68 std::cout << "Loading lookup table..." << std::endl;
69 LookupTable* t = new LookupTable(fileName1);
70 std::cout << "Size:" << t->sizeRe << "," << t->sizeIm << std::endl;
71 std::cout << "Max:" << t->maxRe << "," << t->maxIm << std::endl;
72 std::cout << "Inc:" << t->incRe << "," << t->incIm << std::endl;
73 std::cout << "f" << t->arg[0][0] << ":" << t->fun[0][0] << std::endl;
74
75 } else if (fileName2 != "") {
76 double maxRe, maxIm, incRe, incIm;
77 std::cout << "Enter maxRe maxIm incRe incIm:" << std::endl;
78 std::cin >> maxRe >> maxIm >> incRe >> incIm;
79
80 ErfcLookupTable(fileName2, maxRe, maxIm, incRe, incIm);
81
82 } else if (fileName3 != "") {
83 std::cout << "Loading lookup table..." << std::endl;
84 LookupTableBin* tb = new LookupTableBin(fileName3);
85 std::cout << "Size:" << tb->sizeRe << "," << tb->sizeIm << std::endl;
86 std::cout << "Max:" << tb->maxRe << "," << tb->maxIm << std::endl;
87 std::cout << "Inc:" << tb->incRe << "," << tb->incIm << std::endl;
88 std::cout << "f" << tb->arg[0][0] << ":" << tb->fun[0][0] << std::endl;
89
90 } else if (fileName4 != "") {
91 double maxRe, maxIm, incRe, incIm;
92 std::cout << "Enter maxRe maxIm incRe incIm:" << std::endl;
93 std::cin >> maxRe >> maxIm >> incRe >> incIm;
94 ErfcLookupTableBin(fileName4, maxRe, maxIm, incRe, incIm);
95 }
96
97}
98

mathFunctions.h
Header file of the class that provides auxiliary mathematical functionalities for the SIE solver.

Generate and save a binary lookup table for cerfc over a complex grid.
